ab: Mapawan kaku a sicudad.
en: I forgot to bring the textbook.

ab: Tatusa han nu mita a mimelaw.
en: I will share it with you.

ab: Mapawan kaku a sisavuric.
en: I forgot to bring the eraser.

ab: Pacaliway nu maku kisu.
en: I can lend you.

ab: Mapawan haw kisu a mikerid tu sisapisurit?
en: Do you forget to bring your pen?

ab: Hay, pacaliwi isaw kaku tu sapisurit nu misu?
en: Yes, can you lend me a pen?

ab: A u maan saw ku sakalahuk nu misu?
en: What would you like for lunch?

ab: U minpaw ku nu maku.
en: I want some bread.

ab: A u maan saw ku sakalavi nu misu?
en: What would you like for dinner?

ab: U hemay ku nu maku.
en: I want some rice.

ab: Na u maan saw ku sakaranam nu misu?
en: What did you have for breakfast?

ab: Na u litaul ku nikaen nu maku.
en: I ate an egg.

ab: Na u maan saw ku sakalahuk nu misu?
en: What did you have for lunch?

ab: Na u titi nu ayam ku nikaen nu maku.
en: I ate the chicken.

ab: Ta! miparukud kita tu mali.
en: Let’s play soccer.

ab: Ka isu ku ayaw, kilim hanaw tu aku kisu anusawni.
ch: B:你先去，我等一下去找你。
en: You go first and I will catch up later.

ab: Ta! midanguy kita.
en: Let’s go swimming.

ab: Ta! mahekulunga kita a tayra.
en: Sure! Let’s go there together.

ab: Ta! mimali kita.
en: Let’s play ball.

ab: Naay, ka u cudad ku ayawen nu mita a miculu’.
en: No, we have to carry books first.

ab: Namisulac tu haw kisu tu wadis?
en: Did you brush your teeth?

ab: Caay hen, misuvaway hen kaku tu kaysing.
en: Not yet. I am doing the dishes.

ab: Namiluwalu’ tu haw kisu?
en: Did you rinse out your mouth?

ab: Hay, namiluwalu’ tu kaku.
en: Yes, I rinsed out my mouth.

ab: Namisuvaw tu haw kisu tu kaysing?
en: Did you wash the dishes?

ab: Namisuvawtu kaku tu kaysing.
en: I already washed the dishes.

ab: Kiya caay saw kamamanaw tu kamay kisu?
en: Why didn’t you wash your hands?

ab: Sawni tu kaku a mamanaw.
en: I will wash my hands later.

ab: Namimaan saw kisu inasani?
en: What were you doing just now?

ab: Namikilim kaku tu pasevana’ay.
en: I went to meet the teacher.

ab: A mimaan saw kisu i herek namicudad?
en: What are you going to do after school?

ab: A kakerur satu kaku a taluma’.
en: I will go home directly.

ab: A mimaan saw cira i herek namicudad?
en: What is she doing after school?

ab: A misakeru cira.
en: She is going to go dancing.
